message:
🐛 Remove redundant demo mode detection from useCachedData hooks (#763)

* 🐛 Fix mode switch showing skeletons without manual refresh

Add reactive useDemoMode() hook to all MCP data hooks so they properly
re-render and refetch when switching between demo and live mode.

Previously, MCP hooks only used the static isDemoMode() function call
inside their callbacks. While the refetch was triggered via registerRefetch,
the components using these hooks didn't know mode had changed and wouldn't
trigger a re-render/refetch on their own.

The fix adds:
1. Import useDemoMode hook in each MCP hook file
2. Call useDemoMode() at the top of each hook to subscribe to changes
3. Add useEffect that watches demoMode and triggers refetch when changed
   (skipping the initial mount to avoid duplicate fetches)

Files updated:
- compute.ts (useGPUNodes, useNodes)
- config.ts (useConfigMaps, useSecrets, useServiceAccounts)
- events.ts (useEvents, useWarningEvents)
- networking.ts (useServices, useIngresses, useNetworkPolicies)
- helm.ts (useHelmReleases, useHelmHistory, useHelmValues)
- kagenti.ts (useKagentiAgents, useKagentiBuilds, useKagentiCards, useKagentiTools)
- operators.ts (useOperators, useOperatorSubscriptions)
- rbac.ts (useK8sRoles, useK8sRoleBindings, useK8sServiceAccounts)
- security.ts (useSecurityIssues, useGitOpsDrifts)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Remove redundant demo mode detection from useCachedData hooks

useCache already handles demo mode detection internally via
useSyncExternalStore, so passing enabled: !demoMode from
useCachedData hooks is redundant and can cause race conditions
during mode switching.

This simplifies the code by letting useCache be the single source
of truth for demo mode detection.

Note: This fixes useCachedData hooks but the dashboard mainly uses
useMCP hooks (useClusters etc.) which may need separate investigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Add demo mode checks to all standalone data hooks

Hooks that fetch data directly (not via useCache) were missing demo
mode awareness, causing them to show identical data in both demo and
live modes. Fixed hooks:

- useArgoCD: 3 hooks now return demo data only in demo mode
- useProw: returns getDemoProwJobs() in demo mode
- useCertManager: returns demo certificates/issuers in demo mode
- useMCS: returns demo exports/imports in demo mode
- useWorkloads: callers now pass enabled: !demoMode
- ClusterDropZone/WorkloadDeployment: use useDemoMode() for switching

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix useDemoDataHook to check demo mode before returning data

The useDemoDataHook function in registerHooks.ts was always returning
demo data regardless of whether demo mode was active. This caused ~50+
unified cards to show identical demo data in both live and demo modes.

Now checks useDemoMode() and returns empty data in live mode, only
returning demo data when demo mode is actually enabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ import { cn } from '../../lib/cn'
 import { useWorkloads, Workload as ApiWorkload } from '../../hooks/useWorkloads'
 import { useClusters } from '../../hooks/useMCP'
 import { useCardLoadingState } from './CardDataContext'
+import { useDemoMode } from '../../hooks/useDemoMode'
 
 // Workload types
 type WorkloadType = 'Deployment' | 'StatefulSet' | 'DaemonSet' | 'Job' | 'CronJob'
@@ -412,11 +413,14 @@ export function WorkloadDeployment(_props: WorkloadDeploymentProps) {
     return () => document.removeEventListener('mousedown', onClickOutside)
   }, [])
 
-  // Fetch real workloads from API
-  const { data: realWorkloads } = useWorkloads()
+  // Check demo mode to avoid fetching live data when in demo mode
+  const { isDemoMode: demoMode } = useDemoMode()
 
-  // Use real data if available, otherwise demo data
-  const isDemo = !realWorkloads || realWorkloads.length === 0
+  // Fetch real workloads from API (skip when in demo mode)
+  const { data: realWorkloads } = useWorkloads(undefined, !demoMode)
+
+  // Use demo data when in demo mode or when no real data available
+  const isDemo = demoMode || !realWorkloads || realWorkloads.length === 0
 
   // In demo mode, derive available clusters from demo workloads' targetClusters
   // In live mode, use real clusters from the API
